_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Knowledge of the DoD implementation of the Risk Management Framework (RMF) to include processes.
reference_document_element_description: Skill in designing and maintaining a model risk governance framework, including policy development, role and responsibility definition, escalation protocols, exception management, and board-level model risk reporting.
comments: DCWF ksa intersects with WIDAI RM domain. RM-S-006 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: OP-K-001 (OP, cosine: 0.494), RM-K-001 (RM, cosine: 0.481).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.3/10 (raw 0.531). Shared vocabulary: [framework, management, risk]. DCWF-only terms [dod, implementation, include, knowledge, processes, rmf] vs WIDAI-only terms [board, definition, designing, development, escalation, exception] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.872 (P=0.876, R=0.868). Balanced P/R — the 14-word DCWF element and 26-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (97.7%). "Knowledge of the DoD implementation of the Risk Management Framework (RMF) to in" and "Skill in designing and maintaining a model risk governance framework, including" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.498 ≈ STS 0.531 (gap 0.033). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [framework, management, risk] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 9.4%. Shared tokens: [framework, management, risk]. DCWF-only: [dod, implementation, include, knowledge, processes, rmf]. WIDAI-only: [board, definition, designing, development, escalation, exception].
